name: MiroFish Prediction Engine
description: 55-agent social simulation prediction engine with P2P consensus — predict market sentiment, policy impact, and social dynamics.

maxConcurrent.label: Max Concurrent Runs
maxConcurrent.description: Maximum number of prediction runs that can execute simultaneously (default: 2)

autoTrigger.label: Auto-Trigger
autoTrigger.description: Automatically trigger predictions when messages contain keywords like 推演, 預測, 模擬
